site.name: Price Lens
site.description: Daily price monitoring for Portuguese supermarkets (Continente, Auchan and Pingo Doce). Turn price swings into savings. More money in your pocket. All in Price Lens.

about.title: About
about.description: Learn about Price Lens and explore 25+ years of historical inflation data for Portugal, the USA, and the Eurozone.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Read the Price Lens terms of service and usage conditions.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Read the Price Lens privacy policy to learn how we handle your data.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage your Price Lens account, preferences, and subscription.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in to Price Lens to track prices, save favorites, and get alerts on Portuguese supermarket products.

app.title: Get the App
app.description: Install Price Lens as a free app on your phone for a faster, offline-ready, full-screen experience.

deals.title: Deals & Price Drops
deals.description: Browse the biggest price drops and best discounts across Portuguese supermarkets. Updated daily.

favorites.title: My Favorites
favorites.description: View and manage your favorite products with price tracking across Portuguese supermarkets.

compare.lookupDescription: Looking up Canonical #{id} on Price Lens.

about.title: About Price Lens
about.body: Price Lens tracks daily price changes across Portuguese supermarkets to make invisible price creep visible. Below you can explore over 25 years of inflation data and understand the bigger picture behind the numbers on the shelf.

page.title: Something went wrong
page.body: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or return to the homepage.

notFound.line2: Looks like you've ventured into the unknown digital realm.

offline.title: You're offline
offline.body: Price Lens needs an internet connection to show the latest prices. Please check your connection and try again.

authCode.title: Sign-in failed
authCode.body: We couldn't complete your sign-in. This can happen if the session expired or you cancelled the flow.

unavailable.title: Lookup unavailable
unavailable.body: Barcode {barcode} is not in our tracked stores, and the external database is temporarily unreachable.

notFound.title: Product not found
notFound.body: Barcode {barcode} does not match any product in our tracked stores.
notFound.searchedOff: We also searched on <off>Open Food Facts</off>. It may be a non-food item, a regional product, or a newly released barcode.

empty.title: Product not found
empty.body: No store products found for this canonical product.

priceDrop.title: Price drop alert
priceDrop.greeting: Hi {name}, a product you're tracking just dropped in price.
priceDrop.footerReason:
You received this because you set a price alert on {site}.
Manage your alerts in your {profile}.
priceDrop.subject: {name} dropped {percent}% in price

favorites.loginToManage: Please log in to manage favorites

productUpdate.unavailableBody: This product is no longer available at the store

loginPrompt.title: Save your favorites
loginPrompt.body: Sign in to monitor prices on the products you care about. We can tell you when it is the best time to buy.

login.subtitle: Save favorites, get price-drop alerts, and keep your list in sync.
login.noSpam: We'll never use your email for spam

alerts.title: Price-drop alerts
alerts.desc: We'll tell you when it's the best time to buy.

valueVisual.label: What you get
valueVisual.subtitle: Charts, volatility, and timing — not just today's shelf price.
valueVisual.insightTitle: Is it a good time to buy?
valueVisual.insightLead: We connect history with today's price so you can spot dips, typical levels, and jumpy swings in seconds.
valueVisual.guidanceTitle: Stay in touch with your products
valueVisual.guidanceBody: Sign in to save favorites, get alerts, and see the same insight on every device — less guessing, more money kept in your pocket.
valueVisual.demoNote: Illustrative example. After sign-in, your products use real price history and stats.
valueVisual.savingsLine: {amount} in tracked promo savings across the catalog right now.

errors.origin-missing: Something went wrong starting the sign-in flow. Please try again.

page.title: Deals & Price Drops
page.subtitle: The biggest price drops and best discounts right now across Portuguese supermarkets.

empty.drops: No recent price drops match these rules (valid price, change within the last two weeks, plausible size). Try another store or check back later: the list fills as data updates.
empty.discounts: No standout discounts for this filter. Try another store.

header.title: My Favorites

welcome.title: Welcome to Price Lens
welcome.subtitle: Track prices across Portuguese supermarkets and never overpay for groceries again. Let's get you set up in 30 seconds.

favorites.title: Favorite products
favorites.description: Track the products you buy regularly and see their price trends over time.

alerts.title: Price alerts
alerts.description: Get notified by email when your tracked products drop in price.

deals.title: Browse deals
deals.description: See the biggest price drops and discounts across all stores in one place.

stores.title: Where do you shop?
stores.subtitle: Select the stores you visit so we can personalize your experience.

ready.title: You're all set!
ready.subtitle: Start browsing products, favorite the ones you care about, and set price alerts to get notified when they drop.

favoritesTab.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Try refreshing the page.
favoritesTab.emptyMessage: Start adding products to your favorites to see them here.

listsTab.emptyMessage: Create a list above and add products from any product page using the "Add to list" action.
listsTab.noItems: No items yet. Add products from product pages.

alertsTab.emptyMessage: Set alerts on products you want to track. We'll email you when prices drop. Visit any product page and tap the bell icon to get started.
alertsTab.summary: {count, plural, one {You have # active alert.} other {You have # active alerts.}} We'll email you when these products drop in price.

planTab.title: Price Lens is free
planTab.intro: Price Lens is completely free during early access. We're actively building new features to help you save money on groceries. Here's what's on our roadmap:

history.title: Full price history
history.description: Unlimited custom product tracking with deep historical data and trend analysis.

alerts.title: Price alerts
alerts.description: Get notified when products you track drop in price. Set custom thresholds per product.

shoppingList.title: Shopping list optimizer
shoppingList.description: Optimize your shopping list across different supermarket sources. Get the best deals and save time.

appearance.themeHint: Switch between light and dark mode

questions.title: Questions?
questions.description: Email Price Lens developer directly at kikojpgoncalves@gmail.com

bug.title: Found a bug?
bug.description: UI glitches or formatting issues? Report them here!

feature.title: Feature request?
feature.description: We're always looking for new ideas! Let us know what you'd like to see.

account.signOutHint: Sign out of your Price Lens account on this device

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.body: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
danger.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
danger.error: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

hero.subtitleMobile: Turn price swings into savings. Money in your pocket.
hero.subtitleDesktop:
Daily price monitoring across Continente, Auchan and Pingo Doce.

Turn supermarket swings into savings. More money in your pocket.

valueProposition.title: How Price Lens helps
valueProposition.subtitle: We do the tracking so you can make smarter choices at the supermarket.

track.title: Track
track.description: Monitor daily price changes across Continente, Auchan, and Pingo Doce — automatically.

understand.title: Understand
understand.description: See full price history and trends for any product — not just today's shelf tag.

save.title: Save
save.description: Make informed decisions and catch price hikes before they compound into real cost increases.

diagonalCta.headingEuros: {euros} in savings across {count} products on sale
diagonalCta.bodyWithStores: Prices shift every week across {count} major chains. What costs €6.99 today was €4.49 last month. Price Lens tracks it all so you buy at the right time.
diagonalCta.body: Prices shift every week across supermarkets. What costs €6.99 today was €4.49 last month. Price Lens tracks it all so you buy at the right time.

personalizedDashboard.subtitle: Track prices, catch deals, and save money on groceries.

sections.favoritesEmpty: No favorites yet. Browse products and tap the heart icon.
sections.recentlyViewedEmpty: Products you view will appear here.

ctaCard.title: Get more from Price Lens
ctaCard.body: Favorite products, set price alerts, and browse deals to start saving on groceries.

diagonalRight.title: Track the products you care about
diagonalRight.body: Save your favorites and we'll tell you when prices drop. Free, no spam.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Track supermarket prices and stay aware of inflation with Price Lens. Choose the plan that works for you.

items.compare: Access and compare multiple supermarkets origins

plus.name: Plus
plus.description: Advanced tracking for savvy shoppers and inflation doomers

items.dailyReports: Daily price reports (vs. weekly in Free)
items.exportApi: Export CSV data and API access

pricing.footer: All plans include the core functionality for price transparency and inflation awareness. Any questions? <link>Contact us</link>

priceCreep.title: The invisible price creep
priceCreep.subtitle: Prices don't jump - they creep. A tiny increase each month seems like nothing. But compound it over time and the picture changes completely.
priceCreep.callout: Each month the increase is too small to care about. But compounded over time, your grocery bill is significantly higher - and no one asked for your permission.

inflationBasket.badge: Inflation depends on a selected basket of products
inflationBasket.title: Beware of price trends within key products
inflationBasket.body: The inflation basket represents essential products selected by economic authorities to track consumer prices. The selection can change over time, but Price Lens keeps an eye on price trends on products that matter forever. Who doesn't care about the price of essentials like tuna, eggs, milk, etc.?

inflationContext.title: It's not just groceries
inflationContext.body: Inflation compounds silently. Since 1999, €100 worth of goods in Portugal now costs €{value}. The same pattern repeats at the product level - which is exactly what Price Lens tracks.

chart.title: Cumulative Inflation (1999 to 2024)
chart.description: What €100 from 1999 looks like today for Portugal, the USA, and the Eurozone.

inflationContext.footer: Historical CPI-U data from US Bureau of Labor Statistics, Eurostat, and INE Portugal. <link>See the full inflation analysis →</link>

inflationTrends.title: Inflation trends since 1999
inflationTrends.subtitle: Historical Consumer Price Index (CPI-U) inflation rates from the US Bureau of Labor Statistics, Portugal and Eurozone. Data represents year-over-year percentage change spanning 25+ years of economic cycles.

stats.fedTargetNote: Long-term goal only {met} out of {total} years

table.title: Historical Inflation Data
table.summary: Data represents a cumulative inflation rate of {usa}%, {pt}% and {eu}% for the USA, Portugal and Eurozone since 1999, respectively.
table.summary2: In other words, having 100.00$ in 1999, is having {value}$ today.

convergence.title: Inflation Convergence
convergence.description: Take a look at the yearly fluctuations of inflation for the USA, Portugal and Eurozone.

inflationTrends.impactTitle: Why USA inflation hits Portugal hard
inflationTrends.impactSubtitle: Portugal's small open economy is structurally exposed to USA monetary policy and global commodity flows. Here's how shocks propagate.

savePotential.subtitle: Most products go on discount at some point. Buy at the right time and the savings compound fast. Drag the slider to see your potential.
savePotential.label: Products you buy per month
savePotential.fineprint: Assumes average product price of €{price}, ~{chance}% of products go on sale each month, and an average discount of {rate}%.
savePotential.disclaimer: Actual savings depend on regular shopping habits.

savingsSpotlight.headlinePart1: "Time in the market, beats timing the market"
savingsSpotlight.spotlightTitle: The average shopper could save up to <highlight>€{savings}/year</highlight> just by buying at the right time
savingsSpotlight.spotlightBody: Supermarkets constantly rotate promotions across brands and stores. Price Lens tracks those discounts, so you stock up when prices are lowest and stop overpaying for everyday groceries.

atStore.title: I'm at the store
atStore.description: Pick your store. See what's worth buying today from your favorites and lists.

trackSavings.title: Track your savings
trackSavings.description: See how much you've saved over time by shopping smarter with Price Lens.

aboutTeaser.title: Why track prices?
aboutTeaser.subtitle: Portuguese grocery inflation hit 20%+ over the last 5 years. Small savings compound.

creep.title: Invisible price creep
creep.text: Small hikes on everyday products add up to hundreds of euros you never noticed losing.

history.title: Full price history
history.text: See exactly how a product's price has moved over weeks and months across stores.

timing.title: Buy at the right time
timing.text: Most products cycle through discounts. Price Lens shows you when prices drop.

cta.title: Understand the bigger picture
cta.body: See the data behind Portuguese grocery inflation and how Price Lens helps.

metadata.description: Browse and compare prices across supermarkets
metadata.descriptionWithQuery: Browse and compare prices for "{query}" across supermarkets

metadata.viewDetails: View product details on Price Lens

goodDeal.label: Good buy
goodDeal.aria: Strong offer: high price-drop score, big discount, or typical price with a promotion

freshness.title: Price last verified
freshness.scrapeNote: When our scrape confirms the listing, we record this timestamp.
freshness.priorityDesktop: This product has priority {priority} meaning it is checked every {refresh}.
freshness.priorityMobile: We aim to refresh about every {refresh}. Priority {priority} sets how often it is queued.
freshness.addToTrackDesktop: Add to favorites to enable regular price tracking.
freshness.addToTrackMobile: Favorites: add this product to bump how often we check it.

alertButton.setDescription: We'll notify you when the price drops.
alertButton.tooltipSet: Get notified when the price drops

favoriteButton.signInAria: Sign in to add to favorites

dealSummary.viewCheaperAria: View cheaper price at partner store (save {amount})
dealSummary.compareBelow: Compare stores below for the best current price.
dealSummary.addToFavoritesHint: Add to favorites to build price history. You'll see how typical this price is.

summary.singlePrice: Only one price has been recorded in this window.
summary.unmatched: We couldn't match the current price to the aggregated history.
summary.mostCommon: Current price ({priceLabel}) is the most common in our sample (~{freqPct}% of observations).
summary.nascent: This price has only been at this level for about {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} in our ~{historyDays}-day sample ({freqPhrase}), so it looks uncommon—that often means a new or brief price, not only a special deal. The most common price is {modalPrice}.
summary.frequency: Across our tracked history (time-weighted), this price appears {freqPhrase}. The most common price is {modalPrice}.

related.title: Related Products
related.emptyMessage: We couldn't find related products for this item right now. Check back later as our catalog updates regularly.

browseEmpty.title: No results found
browseEmpty.message: Try adjusting your filters to find what you're looking for.
browseEmpty.messageWithQuery: We couldn't find any products matching "{query}". Try a different search term or clear your filters.
browseEmpty.essentialsHint: Or see top-priority essentials, sorted from cheapest to most expensive:

showcase.title: Products
showcase.priorityHelp: Products have priority levels from 0 to 5. When favorited, products are assigned 5

states.loadErrorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.

states.emptyMessage: Browse the catalog to see products here.

offDetails.title: Product Details
offDetails.subtitle: From Open Food Facts
offDetails.dataQualityNote: Based on Open Food Facts data completeness score

offCard.externalNote: This product was found externally but is not currently tracked in our stores.

offSearch.intro: Looking for something similar? Try searching our tracked stores with similar keywords.

offPage.notTracked: This product was not found in our tracked stores, but we found it on <link>Open Food Facts</link>
offPage.sparseData: Open Food Facts has limited data for this product. <link>Help improve it</link>

batch.loadedSoFar: {count, plural, one {# product loaded so far} other {# products loaded so far}}

off.noStoresBody: We don't track this product yet, but here's what Open Food Facts knows about it.

search.title: Looking for similar products?
search.body: Search our tracked supermarkets for matching products.

offBrand.moreFrom: More from {brand} on Open Food Facts
offBrand.seeMoreFrom: See more from {brand} on Open Food Facts
offBrand.loadError: Could not load products. Try again later.

offLookup.notFoundCallout: This product was not found in our tracked stores, but we can try to find it elsewhere
offLookup.takingLong: Open Food Facts is taking a bit longer than usual. Hang tight!
offLookup.stillWaiting: Still waiting… you can also try searching manually:

priceStats.heading: How stable is this price?
priceStats.checksIn90d: {count, plural, one {# price check in the last 90 days} other {# price checks in the last 90 days}}

leads.medium: Moves up and down a bit

fewPointsBigMove.compact: Big move, few price points. Compare shops.
fewPointsBigMove.long: Recent change is large and we still have few price points in this window. Check the chart and other stores before you decide.

hugeSwing.compact: Huge swing. Verify on the chart.
hugeSwing.long: This change looks big compared to what we've seen. Treat it as rough and confirm on the chart.

seeChart.long: Use the chart to see if today's price is normal for this product.

dropWhenVolatile.compact: Bumpy history. Chart shows if it's a deal.
dropWhenVolatile.long: This price often moves. A drop can still be a deal. Glance at the chart before you buy.

calmNoRecentDrop.compact: Fairly calm. No rush from this alone.
calmNoRecentDrop.long: Recently this price has been fairly calm. No need to rush based on this hint alone.

unusualDropWhenCalm.compact: Unusual drop for a steady price. Peek at the chart.
unusualDropWhenCalm.long: A drop like this is less common when the price is usually steady. Worth comparing the chart and other stores.

insufficient.sameLevel: Every recorded price is at the same level, so volatility is zero.
insufficient.stillSyncing: The short stability blurb is still syncing. The chart and frequency table below already show how this price moved.
insufficient.noSummaryYet: We don't have a stability summary for this product yet. The chart and frequency table below show how the price moved.
insufficient.noHistory: No price history in our records for this product yet.
insufficient.oneCheck: Only one price check in this window, so volatility is zero. See the chart below for context.
insufficient.noChecks90d: No checks in this 90-day window yet. The chart shows what we have.
insufficient.needMoreData: We need more recorded prices in the last 90 days before stability notes are meaningful. The chart below is still the best place to look.
insufficient.fallback: Stability stats are not available yet. The chart below is still the best place to look.

barcodeCompare.stableDays: Stable {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
barcodeCompare.storesAndListings: {stores, plural, one {# store} other {# stores}} · {listings, plural, one {# listing} other {# listings}}
barcodeCompare.saveUpTo: <highlight>Save up to {amount}€</highlight> by choosing the cheapest option

identicalCross.title: Identical Products in other stores
identicalCross.emptyMessage: We couldn't find this product in other stores right now.

identical.noOtherStores: No other stores for this product
identical.onlyHere: We only found this listing in the current store ({store}).
identical.savingsBySwitching: <highlight>Save {amount}€</highlight> by switching to the cheapest store
identical.tiedCheapest: You're viewing a listing at the lowest price ({cheapest}€). Other offers go up to {highest}€.
identical.allSamePrice: All tracked stores show the same price: you're not missing a better deal elsewhere.

chart.notAvailableInStore: This product is not available in this store.

table.pvprColumnHint: Recommended retail price (reference on the label)
table.isMostCommon: Current price is the most common price.
table.notMostCommon: Current price is not the most common price.

notTracked.body: This product is not being tracked actively. It was last checked {ago} ago. Add this product to your favorites to enable regular price tracking.

noData.body: Data will appear as we track this product.

footerFull.openSource: Code is open source and available on <link>GitHub</link>

pwa.installBody: Add the app to your home screen for a faster experience.

appPage.title: Get the App
appPage.subtitle: Price Lens works better as an app outside the browser. Install it on your device for a faster, offline-ready, full-screen experience without going through an App Store.

ios.title: iPhone & iPad
ios.step1: Open this page in Safari (required for iOS)
ios.step2: Tap the Share button in the toolbar
ios.step3: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"
ios.step4: Make sure "Open as Web App" is enabled, then tap Add

android.title: Android & Chrome
android.step1: Tap the Install button above, or tap the browser menu (⋮)
android.step2: Select "Install app" or "Add to Home screen"

desktop.title: Desktop (Chrome, Edge)
desktop.step1: Click the Install button above, or look for the install icon in the address bar

terms.heading: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By accessing the website at Price Lens, you are agreeing to be bound by these terms of service, all applicable laws and regulations, and agree that you are responsible for compliance with any applicable local laws.

license.title: 1. Use License
license.body: Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials (information or software) on Price Lens' website for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not:

items.commercial: use the materials for any commercial purpose, or for any public display (commercial or non-commercial);
items.reverse: attempt to decompile or reverse engineer any software contained on Price Lens' website;
items.copyright: remove any copyright or other proprietary notations from the materials; or
items.transfer: transfer the materials to another person or "mirror" the materials on any other server.

license.termination: This license shall automatically terminate if you violate any of these restrictions and may be terminated by Price Lens at any time.

disclaimer.title: 2. Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: The materials on Price Lens' website are provided on an 'as is' basis. Price Lens makes no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaims and negates all other warranties including, without limitation, implied warranties or conditions of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement of intellectual property or other violation of rights.

limitations.title: 3. Limitations
limitations.body: In no event shall Price Lens or its suppliers be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on Price Lens' website, even if Price Lens or a Price Lens authorized representative has been notified orally or in writing of the possibility of such damage.

governingLaw.title: 4. Governing Law
governingLaw.body: These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Portugal and you irrevocably submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in that State or location.

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. It is Price Lens' policy to respect your privacy regarding any information we may collect from you across our website.

collect.title: 1. Information We Collect
collect.body1: We only ask for personal information when we truly need it to provide a service to you. We collect it by fair and lawful means, with your knowledge and consent. We also let you know why we're collecting it and how it will be used.
collect.body2: The only personal information we collect is via your authentication provider (e.g., Google) when you sign up. This includes your email address, name, and profile picture. We do not collect any other personal data.

use.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
use.body: We use the collected information to create and manage your account, and to provide you with access to our services. We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties, except as required by law.

storage.title: 3. Data Storage and Security
storage.body1: We only retain collected information for as long as necessary to provide you with your requested service. What data we store, we'll protect within commercially acceptable means to prevent loss and theft, as well as unauthorized access, disclosure, copying, use or modification.
storage.body2: Our website may link to external sites that are not operated by us. Please be aware that we have no control over the content and practices of these sites, and cannot accept responsibility or liability for their respective privacy policies.

rights.title: 4. Your Rights
rights.body: You are free to refuse our request for your personal information, with the understanding that we may be unable to provide you with some of your desired services.

contact.title: 5. Contact Us
contact.body: If you have any questions about how we handle user data and personal information, feel free to contact us.

search.placeholder: What product are you looking for?
